compiled_state.title: resolve-conflicts skill misdetects merge state when conflicts are pre-resolved

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Root cause: skill only checks git diff --diff-filter=U for conflicts but doesn't check MERGE_HEAD existence. When conflicts are pre-resolved (git add), --diff-filter=U returns empty but MERGE_HEAD still exists — skill incorrectly reports 'no conflicts detected' instead of recognizing the merge needs committing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
